summary.short_summary: This chapter introduces the main ideas of Human Health and Disease in biology.
summary.detailed_summary: This chapter for Class 12 biology explains the core concepts of Human Health and Disease. It is intended as a structured study summary for CBSE learners.

key_concepts.title: Introduction to Human Health and Disease
key_concepts.explanation: This concept introduces the basic idea of Human Health and Disease.

key_concepts.title: Core ideas in Human Health and Disease
key_concepts.explanation: This concept covers the main principles and important points in Human Health and Disease.

key_concepts.title: Applications of Human Health and Disease
key_concepts.explanation: This concept explains common uses, examples, or relevance of Human Health and Disease.

practice_questions.question: What is the main idea introduced in the chapter 'Human Health and Disease'?
practice_questions.answer: The chapter 'Human Health and Disease' introduces foundational concepts in biology for Class 12.

practice_questions.question: Explain one important concept from the chapter 'Human Health and Disease'.
practice_questions.answer: One important concept from 'Human Health and Disease' is understanding its core ideas and how they apply within biology.

practice_questions.question: How can the ideas from 'Human Health and Disease' be applied in a practical learning context?
practice_questions.answer: The ideas from 'Human Health and Disease' can be applied by solving examples, analyzing situations, and connecting concepts to real learning problems in biology.

mcqs.question: What is the main focus of the chapter 'Human Health and Disease'?

options.A: Understanding the core concepts of Human Health and Disease

mcqs.explanation: The chapter 'Human Health and Disease' mainly focuses on understanding its core concepts in biology for Class 12.

mcqs.question: Which of the following best describes a useful way to study 'Human Health and Disease'?
mcqs.explanation: A useful way to study 'Human Health and Disease' is by reviewing the concepts carefully and practicing relevant questions.

mcqs.question: Why is 'Human Health and Disease' important in the study of biology?

options.A: Because it replaces all other chapters
options.B: Because it has no connection to the subject
options.C: Because it builds understanding of important ideas within biology
options.D: Because it is only useful for memorization

mcqs.explanation: 'Human Health and Disease' is important because it helps build understanding of major ideas and their relevance within biology.
